steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate and present project state to researcher; build cross-task test-vs-literature audit.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Structured discussion with researcher on tasks, suggestion cleanup, confirmation.

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Create four new child tasks, write five correction files, save comparison table.

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, step logs, session capture, run verificators, PR, merge.
